summary: MFRC522 RFID reader/writer module via SPI interface. Reads/writes MIFARE Classic 1K/4K cards and tags at 13.56MHz.
notes: MFRC522 operates at 3.3V; do NOT connect to 5V.
Card detection range ~3-5cm depending on antenna.

app_logic_snippets.api_summary: RC522_Init() RC522_AntennaOn() RC522_AntennaOff() RC522_DetectCard(uid,len) RC522_Auth(block,key) RC522_ReadBlock(block,data) RC522_WriteBlock(block,data) RC522_Halt()
app_logic_snippets.notes: Always call RC522_Halt() after reading to release the card. Auth is required before reading/writing data blocks. Sector trailer (block 3,7,11...) contains keys; do NOT overwrite without backup.
